description: ServiceAccountRef is a service account used by cert-manager to request a token. By default two audiences are included: the address of the Vault server as specified on the issuer, and a generated audience taking the form of `vault://namespace-name/issuer-name` for an Issuer and `vault://issuer-name` for a ClusterIssuer. The expiration of the token is also set by cert-manager to 10 minutes.

audiences.description: TokenAudiences is an optional list of extra audiences to include in the token passed to Vault. The default audiences are always included in the token.

name.description: Name of the ServiceAccount used to request a token.
